javadoc_before:
/** * Decorates an iterator such that it cannot be modified. *

* Attempts to modify it will result in an UnsupportedOperationException. *

* * @param the type of elements returned by this iterator. * @since 3.0 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Decorates an iterator such that it cannot be modified. *

* Calling {@link #remove()} throws {@link UnsupportedOperationException}. *

* * @param the type of elements returned by this iterator. * @param The wrapped Iterator type. * @since 3.0 */
